report.title: e-Surveyor: Region from Coordinates
report.description: Convert a coordinate to a NUTS 3 region location ID in e-Surveyor
report.query: SELECT #columns# FROM locations l WHERE l.location_type_id=18062 AND ST_Contains(l.boundary_geom, ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#lon#, #lat#), 4326), 900913)) AND l.deleted=false
